summary: Comprehensive iteration 2 testing of MJ விண்வெளி அனுபவம் - all new features verified: live astronomy, object/gallery detail pages, astrology calculator with Kundali export, timeline horizontal scroll, feature showcase, masonry objects grid

issues: Time input defaults to 08:00 AM instead of empty - minor UX issue (same as prev iteration)

critical_code_review_comments: All APIs working correctly - /api/live-astronomy returns 'lunar' (nested object with phase_name, illumination, phase_days), /api/objects/:id and /api/gallery/:id both return proper data
Gallery items use title_tamil/title_english fields (no generic 'title' field) - frontend uses these correctly
No emojis found in major UI text (Tamil-first design maintained)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified: Hero (MJ branding, Tamil text, starfield, CTA buttons), Feature Showcase (SPACE BEGINS HERE + Pillars of Creation + stats), Live Astronomy (lunar phase data, upcoming events - API returns 'lunar' key not 'lunar_phase'), 3D Solar System (Three.js renders), Space section (Past 20/Present 15/Future 15 tabs), Astronomy Objects masonry grid (16 cards), Object Detail page (/object/:id) - tested with Sun, Gallery Detail page (/gallery/:id) - tested with Hubble Deep Field, Timeline horizontal scroll, Astrology Calculator (form fills + Rasi/Nakshatra/Lagna results + Kundali Export button visible). All 21 backend tests pass.
